message:
fix(approval): populate plan_hash fields in token creation and remaining queries

Complete the schema v19 plan_hash integration:
- Initialize plan_hash, plan_version, risk_summary to None in
  ApprovalStore::create_token (approval.rs)
- Update query_approval_token_by_hash to SELECT and deserialize
  the new columns (storage.rs)
- Add plan_hash fields to test fixture ApprovalTokenRecord (storage.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
